summary: The diff implements most of the required community page features including backend data types, frontend components for banner customization, draggable tabs, home tab with posts, chat placeholder, and other tab placeholders. However, several requirements have gaps or concerns, and some non-community files appear to have been modified in violation of REQ-10.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend canister methods: createPost, getPosts, updateBannerSettings (host-only), updateTabOrder (host or permitted), grantTabReorderPermission (host-only), revokeTabReorderPermission (host-only), getTabPermissions, getTabOrder with default [Home, Chat, Lore, Polls, Quizzes, Rules]
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and only shows data type definitions and imports. The actual canister method implementations are not visible in the diff. The migration.mo adds the types but actual method bodies cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Stats bar below the banner showing member count and total post count fetched from the backend
missing_requirements.reason: In CommunityPage.tsx, the community query returns null with a comment saying the backend does not have a getCommunity method, meaning member count cannot be fetched from the backend. Member count display with real backend data is not verifiably implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Banner image stored on-chain and changes persist across page reloads
missing_requirements.reason: CommunityPage initializes bannerSettings from local state with hardcoded defaults and does not fetch persisted banner settings from the backend on mount because the community query returns null. Therefore banner settings do not persist across page reloads.

missing_requirements.requirement: Active community ID preserved in React state or context so navigating away and back returns to the same community page view
missing_requirements.reason: No CommunitiesHubPage or parent context wrapper is shown in the diff that stores and restores the active community ID across tab navigation. The state persistence mechanism across tab changes is not demonstrated.

hallucinated_features.description: Modifications to non-community frontend files including chat components, document components, session components, and hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-10 explicitly states no files outside the Communities tab feature area should be modified. The diff shows modifications to many files outside the Communities tab including chat, docs, session components, and hooks.

hallucinated_features.description: isCommunityHost and isCommunityHostOrPermitted backend method calls from frontend
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies only specific canister methods. The frontend calls actor.isCommunityHost and actor.isCommunityHostOrPermitted which are not listed among the required canister methods.

hallucinated_features.description: getUserProfile backend call from PostItem to resolve author display names
hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation calls actor.getUserProfile from within the communities PostItem component, which is not listed as a required new backend method for the communities feature.
